# SAError.Code.operationFailed

**Case**

The requested operation failed; retrying may succeed.

## Declaration

```swift
case operationFailed
```

## Determining the error type

- **SAError.Code.invalidArgument**: The passed argument is invalid.
- **SAError.Code.notAllowed**: The system restricts the feature on this iPhone at the current time.
- **SAError.Code.notAuthorized**: The app isn’t authorized to perform the requested operation.
